name: Pharmacy
description: Medication dispensing, pharmaceutical counseling, and prescription support services.

name: Laboratory
description: Diagnostic laboratory testing, specimen handling, and result processing services.

name: Radiology
description: Imaging and radiology services including scans, X-rays, and diagnostic imaging support.

name: Maternity
description: Maternal care services covering pregnancy, delivery, and postnatal support.

name: Antenatal
description: Routine antenatal care, pregnancy monitoring, and maternal wellness services.

name: Emergency
description: Emergency response, urgent care, stabilization, and emergency treatment services.

name: Dental
description: Dental consultation, oral health treatment, and preventive dental care services.

name: Dialysis
description: Dialysis treatment and renal support services for patients requiring kidney care.

name: Physiotherapy
description: Physical rehabilitation, mobility support, and restorative therapy services.

name: Mental Health
description: Mental health assessment, counseling, psychiatric, and psychosocial support services.

name: Immunization
description: Routine and targeted immunization, vaccination, and preventive health services.

name: Blood Bank
description: Blood collection, screening, storage, and transfusion support services.

name: Surgery
description: Surgical consultation, theatre operations, and perioperative care services.

name: Pediatrics
description: Child health assessment, treatment, monitoring, and pediatric support services.

name: Cardiology
description: Heart and cardiovascular assessment, monitoring, and cardiology support services.

name: Orthopedics
description: Bone, joint, and musculoskeletal assessment, treatment, and orthopedic care services.

name: Ophthalmology
description: Eye care, vision assessment, treatment, and ophthalmology support services.

name: Oncology
description: Cancer screening, oncology consultation, treatment support, and follow-up services.

name: Family Medicine
description: Primary care, family medicine consultation, and community health support services.
